scripts.validate:energy: ajv validate -s schemas/energy/telemetry.v1.json -r schemas/common/g2-envelope.v1.json -d examples/energy/telemetry-iqwatch-live.v1.json --spec=draft2020 -c ajv-formats && ajv validate -s schemas/energy/telemetry.v1.json -r schemas/common/g2-envelope.v1.json -d examples/energy/telemetry-iqtrailer-cerbo-live.v1.json --spec=draft2020 -c ajv-formats
scripts.validate:registry: ajv validate -s schemas/registry/device-record.v1.json -d examples/registry/hil-iq-26-00001.v1.json --spec=draft2020 -c ajv-formats && ajv validate -s schemas/registry/device-record.v1.json -d examples/iqtrailer/registry-record.v1.json --spec=draft2020 -c ajv-formats
